---
title: "Slides"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

<div class="landing-stack">

::: {.hero-panel .slides-intro}
<span class="hero-eyebrow">Slides</span>

# Short decks for the method sequence

Use this section to open the teaching decks and talk tracks for each topic.
:::

## Slide Library {#slide-library .section-heading}

<p class="section-intro">Each topic has one card. Use the RevealJS deck as the main entry point and the page view or notes as secondary references.</p>

::: {.section-grid .slides-grid}
::: {.section-card .slide-topic-card}
<span class="page-badge badge-core">Matching</span>

### Why We Do Matching

Primary presentation deck for the matching sequence.

[Open RevealJS deck](why_matching-revealjs.html){.topic-card-primary}

::: {.topic-card-links}
[Accessible slides page](why_matching.qmd){.topic-card-secondary}
[Presenter notes](why_matching_script.qmd){.topic-card-secondary}
:::

::: {.card-meta}
Use the accessible page when you want the outline and citations. Use the presenter notes for rehearsal or first delivery.
:::
:::

::: {.section-card .slide-topic-card}
<span class="page-badge badge-skeleton">Synthetic Control</span>

### Synthetic Control

Reserved slot for the SCM concept deck and follow-on talk track.

[Open placeholder deck](scm.qmd){.topic-card-primary}

::: {.topic-card-links}
[Synthetic control notes](../notes/scm/synthetic-control.qmd){.topic-card-secondary}
[Design lab](../labs/synthetic-control-design-lab.qmd){.topic-card-secondary}
[Donor pool lab](../labs/synthetic-control-donor-pool-lab.qmd){.topic-card-secondary}
:::

::: {.card-meta}
Build the RevealJS deck and presenter notes here next.
:::
:::
:::
 
</div>
